calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Passalacqua for Petitioner.

Mr. Passalacqua provided a copy of the declaration that he filed on Thursday, stated that it addresses the issues raised by the Probate Examiner, that he has the original computershare statement and will retain it, and that he attached the invoices to support costs. Mr. Passalacqua also stated that they did publication for the date on the original proof of service, that the matter was continued, that they filed an amendment and did publication again, that he was not sure why the filing service did not e-file a document and that he is not opposed to the Court reducing his fees for the amounts in question. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
